name: pixu-dev-resume
description: Static resume for Emiliano Pisu, built from Markdown and live public profile data.
author: Emiliano "Pixu" Pisu

scripts.build: pnpm assets:favicons && pnpm format && pnpm lint && vite build
scripts.build:interactive: pnpm assets:favicons && node scripts/build.js --interactive && pnpm format && pnpm lint && vite build
scripts.prepush:check: pnpm build && pnpm exec playwright install && pnpm test
scripts.rel:major: pnpm build:interactive && git add . && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push -f && pnpm version major --message "chore(release): v%s" && git push && git push --tags
scripts.rel:minor: pnpm build:interactive && git add . && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push -f && pnpm version minor --message "chore(release): v%s" && git push && git push --tags
scripts.rel:patch: pnpm build:interactive && git add . && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push -f && pnpm version patch --message "chore(release): v%s" && git push && git push --tags
